description:
Offscreen surfaces created via `c11 new-surface --no-focus` never call `ghostty_surface_new` because SwiftUI never mounts the unselected tab. `c11 send` then silently drops bytes (returns OK, queues into `pendingTextQueue`, never flushes). Breaks the lattice-orchestrator pattern.

**Root cause:** `surface.create` is not in `focusIntentV2Methods` → `v2FocusAllowed` clamps focus to false → tab is added without selection → view never enters a window → `attachToView`'s `view.window != nil` guard keeps `ghostty_surface_t` nil indefinitely. c11's recovery hook (`waitForTerminalSurfaceOffMain` → `requestBackgroundSurfaceStartIfNeeded` → `createSurface(for: view)` on an off-window view) is the path upstream concluded is unreliable and retreated from.

**Upstream fix:** `manaflow-ai/cmux` PR #4233 (commit `5cb4715a8`, 2026-05-16): creates a borderless headless NSWindow at `TerminalSurface.init` for surfaces with startup work, attaches the view to that window so `view.window != nil` is satisfied, `ghostty_surface_new` runs cleanly. Replaces the c11-style off-window createSurface in `requestBackgroundSurfaceStartIfNeeded` with delegation to `scheduleHeadlessRuntimeStartIfNeeded`.

**Scope:** 11 files, ~1062 lines. Big ones: `GhosttyTerminalView.swift` (+525), `TerminalController.swift` (-384 net). Expected conflicts on `PendingSocketInput` (upstream renamed `text(Data)` → `pasteText(Data)` + `inputText(String)`) and `requestBackgroundSurfaceStartIfNeeded`.

**Deliverable:** PR that cherry-picks/ports `5cb4715a8` cleanly into c11 main, with the upstream regression test (`tests_v2/test_cli_background_terminal_helpers_start_pty.py`) green on a tagged build. Update lattice-orchestrator skill to reflect the fix.

**Research:** Full diagnosis at `/tmp/c11-pty-wedge-research.md` and prior `/tmp/c11-pty-wedge-diagnosis.md`. Upstream issues #4187, #4192. c11 docs: `code/c11/CLAUDE.md` 'Pitfalls' + 'Socket command threading policy'.
title: Port upstream PR #4233 — fix offscreen terminal PTY wedge
